subcodes.first_line: O faithful and serene leaf! In the face of this supreme ordeal and dire calamity that hath befallen in the path of the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مومنه مطمئنه از این مصیبت عظمی و بلیه کبری که در سبیل حضرت کبریا بر
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
